name: Cheese Danish
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch pan with one package of crescent rolls by pressing together.
2. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese, sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla until combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the dough in the pan.
4. Place the remaining package of crescent rolls on top and crimp to seal.
5. Whisk the egg whites and brush the tops of the pastry with the beaten eggs.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
Optional: When cool, dust with sifted powdered sugar, chocolate glaze, or fruit and whipped cream.
